name: Tim Ingram
bio: Tim Ingram serves as the Titus County Sheriff, providing law enforcement services to Titus County from the county seat of Mount Pleasant. Sheriff Ingram leads a dedicated department focused on keeping the diverse and growing Titus County community safe.
campaignPromises: Provide bilingual services to serve all Titus County residents
Enhance patrol presence around industrial areas and poultry plants
Modernize the county jail to meet growing detention needs
Strengthen drug enforcement operations on county highways
Build community trust through outreach and transparency
